location.office_time_required: Monday-Thursday in-office (4 days/week), Fridays from home

level_signals: Base salary range $207,000–$244,000, consistent with Senior IC at a late-stage fintech
Expected to own product strategy and execution independently
Embedding within cross-functional squads as subject-matter expert

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Product management experience owning platform, data, or analytics products in a complex organization
Experience partnering closely with data engineering teams on foundations such as data models, pipelines, or metrics layers
Comfort operating as an embedded PM within cross-functional squads
Strong ability to translate ambiguous stakeholder questions into scalable product solutions
Experience supporting analytics, reporting, or insight-generation use cases for multiple audiences
Ability to communicate clearly across technical and business stakeholders

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Prior exposure to fintech, financial services, or highly regulated environments (preferred)

scope.surface: Data Foundations & Insights — data models, pipelines, metrics layers, self-serve data platforms and tooling
core_responsibilities: Own product strategy and execution for data foundations and insights supporting core products
Partner closely with data engineering and analytics to build scalable, self-serve data platforms and tooling
Embed with cross-functional squads as the data subject-matter expert, translating stakeholder needs into scalable, reusable data products and data platform solutions
Improve time-to-insight and data cycle time for business, product, and compliance use cases
Drive stakeholder satisfaction by delivering reliable, well-documented, and trusted data products
Communicate effectively with both highly technical and non-technical partners across the organization

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($207K–$244K base) plus bonus and equity
Clear product surface and ownership area (Data Foundations & Insights)
Role is embedded within XFN squads, suggesting meaningful influence
Fintech domain experience is preferred but not required, lowering bar for adjacent candidates
Chime is a well-known, mission-driven fintech with significant scale
red_flags: In-office Monday–Thursday in San Francisco is a strong geographic constraint, eliminating remote candidates
No minimum years of experience specified, making level calibration opaque
Visa sponsorship not mentioned; unclear for international candidates
JD hashtag #LI-Onsite but benefits section describes a hybrid model — mild inconsistency
